query:
SELECT 
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.leadName, cs.leadPhone, cs.isBooked, cs.stage, cs.updatedAt
FROM conversation_sessions cs
WHERE cs.isBooked = 1 OR cs.stage = 'BOOKED'
ORDER BY cs.updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
